arts.ttl: Manchester United’s Casmerio reveals Malacia medal gesture
arts.sum: Casemiro has revealed he gave Manchester United teammate Tyrell Malacia his FA Cup winner’s medal from last season. Manchester United won the FA Cup in 2023/24 after beating Manchester City at Wembley, as goals from Alejandro Garnacho and Kobbie Mainoo sealed silverware success. Malacia played no part in the cup triumph, having been sidelined […] The post Manchester United’s Casmerio reveals Malacia medal gesture first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: The 'surprising' decision that 'left Ten Hag on an island' at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ten Hag’s final few months at Old Trafford saw him bring in the likes of Ruud van Nistelrooy, while a number of Dutch coaches also joined his coaching staff during his tenure. Ten Hag had appointed former United coach Steve McClaren to his staff upon his arrival in 2022 but the ex-England manager left his role in July for a stint in charge of the Jamaica national team.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim takes charge of a Premier League game at Old Trafford for the first time on Sunday, as Manchester United host Everton. The Portuguese coach recorded his first win in charge in the Europa League on Thursday, as the Red Devils survived a scare to beat Bodo/Glimt 3-2 at home.
